description: 1. short-Sleeved, appropriate for any sport or daily activity2. Composition is 100% organic cotton3. Flexible and lightweight interlock fabric provides a super soft feelFor the women who don't mind blending a bit if style with their work out sessions, these trendy t-shirts are just meant for them! The tread-mill won't mind having you on it for a longer session, with that super soft feel t-shirts wrapping you up!"Every t-shirt has a different identity. It's a medium of expressing your attitude & personality. It is comfortable, durable, easy to wear and maintain which makes it the best 'type' of casual clothing. It has a mass appeal and can be worn in anyway a person wants to. The best part is it just fits anyone of any size. Available in numerous colours and designs which makes it really tough to choose from. Wear it while travelling, playing, exercising, meeting friends, casual get-together's, absolutely anywhere, it won't make you feel out of the place, it is a form of clothing that needs no occasion to advertise itself. Team it up with almost anything and it looks just perfect. It suits everyone and anyone. Is there any other reason a person would want to have one of their own!"Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size XS in T-shirts2. Height-5.7", Chest-32", Waist-26"
